name: assembly-d3-tricubic-on
description: Wave 3 Phase 6f — D3 tricubic toggle on Mechanical Assembly. The CSG-edge thin-feature scene is where D3's quality lift will show most when the marchRay branch lands (sub-pixel-accurate edge intersection via Sturm root finding on the cubic-along-ray polynomial). As of Phase 6e ship, this fixture pixel-matches `assembly-default` (toggle is inert); baseline locks the no-regression contract for the toggle-ON state. Re-approves when marchRay branch wiring ships.
